releases.title: collectZ v3.4.97
releases.summary: This patch adds the first read-only Kavita metadata writeback preview path. Workspace admins can compare current Kavita metadata with collectZ metadata for a Kavita-linked row before any later apply/writeback milestone exists.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a workspace-admin-only Kavita metadata preview endpoint for Kavita-linked media rows.
Added current Kavita series metadata readback through `GET /api/Series/metadata` and chapter preview readback through stored Kavita volume/chapter details.
Added field-level diff output with changed, unchanged, skipped, locked-field, and preview-only mutation-disabled readback.
Added a read-only Kavita Metadata panel in the media detail drawer so operators can inspect preview diffs without writing to Kavita.
Extended the Kavita import/sync smoke to prove preview-only behavior, locked-field skipping, workspace-scoped credentials, and secret-free preview responses.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.96
releases.summary: This patch confirms Kavita exposes metadata mutation endpoints that collectZ can safely target in a later opt-in writeback implementation, while keeping the current Kavita integration read-only at runtime.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a Kavita metadata writeback contract documenting the first writable series/chapter endpoints, the conservative field allowlist, and the required preview/audit/opt-in safety model.
Added pure backend payload builders for future series and chapter metadata writeback.
Added a fake-server probe proving the planned payload shape for `POST /api/Series/metadata` and `POST /api/Chapter/update` without calling a real Kavita mutation endpoint.
Updated Kavita setup documentation so operators can see writeback is feasible but still disabled until a later implementation milestone.
